addresses.source: Proof 1 (direct): sends 30,000 TON to already-labelled Mercuryo address [EQALOgbZGSUTfavrvyIBAxzk2px7j6r-yPg5KkHZ8wtWcJb2](https://tonviewer.com/EQALOgbZGSUTfavrvyIBAxzk2px7j6r-yPg5KkHZ8wtWcJb2). Proof 2: receives TON from Kraken custodial wallets (CEX liquidity source for on-ramp). ~2.99M TON balance, wallet_highload_v3r1.
addresses.comment: Main TON hot wallet. Funds intermediate hub and labelled Mercuryo addresses. ~$8.4M in TON.

addresses.source: Proof 1: 100% funded by Mercuryo hot wallet [EQDIsFlvCQskFf5V7y4HhfHFdpkr_eQ2rqx1787Dqx8PrDK7](https://tonviewer.com/EQDIsFlvCQskFf5V7y4HhfHFdpkr_eQ2rqx1787Dqx8PrDK7) — receives 15,000 TON + 40 USDT batches. Proof 2: distributes ~36,000 TON each to two downstream distribution wallets in 4,500 TON batches.
addresses.comment: Intermediate distribution hub. Splits funds between two distribution wallets. 19,369 TON balance.

addresses.source: Proof 1: 100% funded by Mercuryo hub [EQBE5Hp2O5DEZ2ExdyO2RUZW6QgwGs0EvTlEd7z-kyfCEoqV](https://tonviewer.com/EQBE5Hp2O5DEZ2ExdyO2RUZW6QgwGs0EvTlEd7z-kyfCEoqV) in 4,500 TON batches. Proof 2: distributes 12-363 TON to ~151 unique fresh user wallets — fiat on-ramp purchase pattern. Tagged unknown_app by another user who noted 'on-ramp вероятнее всего'.
addresses.comment: Distribution wallet A. Delivers TON to users who purchased via fiat on-ramp. 4,897 TON balance.

addresses.source: Proof 1: 100% funded by same Mercuryo hub [EQBE5Hp2O5DEZ2ExdyO2RUZW6QgwGs0EvTlEd7z-kyfCEoqV](https://tonviewer.com/EQBE5Hp2O5DEZ2ExdyO2RUZW6QgwGs0EvTlEd7z-kyfCEoqV) in 4,500 TON batches. Proof 2: identical distribution pattern to wallet A — 12-128 TON to ~134 unique fresh wallets. Shares common intermediate recipients with wallet A.
addresses.comment: Distribution wallet B. Parallel distribution channel for fiat on-ramp purchases. 2,571 TON balance.
